title: Executive Officer - Corporate Banking
description:
Job Description

  • Prospect for new-to-bank corporate clients and onboard new clients to the bank
  • Manage banking relationship with customers
  • Prepare credit proposals in relation to credit facilities, including financial analysis, structuring of facilities terms and conditions and advocating the credit case
  • Review and monitor credit facilities granted to client so as to keep bank updated on credit and risk conditions faced by clients
  • Manage internal bank processes that are required of portfolio and department
  • Support colleagues within department and bank in order to achieve department's and bank's objectives

Job Requirements

  • At least 8 years' experience in a corporate banking role;
  • Preferably with experience in a marketing role
  • Good understanding of accounting and corporate matters
  • Self-starter with strong motivation to learn and develop
  • Proficient oral and writing skills in English and Mandarin Chinese to liaise with HO and chinese clients
  • Aptitude to work independently and under tight timelines
  • Strong problem-solving and people skills

postedCompany.description:
Agricultural Bank of China Limited (“ABC”), Singapore Branch was established in 1995. It is ABC’s first overseas branch. With over 20 years of presence in the local banking industry, excellent customer services, prudent business approach and experienced professionals, Singapore Branch has become one of the well-known commercial banks in Singapore and has upgraded its offshore banking licence to wholesale banking licence in 2012. Leveraging on ABC’s advanced technology platforms and extensive domestic and international office networks, Singapore Branch provides a wide range of financial services to its customers in Singapore, China as well as south-east Asia region. Over the years, it has not only facilitated bilateral economic and trade relations between China and the region, but also contributed greatly to closer ties and friendship among people from both sides.


The main businesses of Singapore Branch include corporate lending, foreign exchange, investment securities, trade financing, international trade settlement and investment banking inquiry services, with competitive advantage in China-related trade financing and settlements, and cross-border renminbi-related trade services. Main customers are global financial institutions, multi-national corporates, and large and medium sized enterprises from China, Singapore and the surrounding region. Singapore Branch will continue to deepen the trade and investment ties between China and Singapore and become ABC’s regional business hub and trade finance centre in the south-east Asia region.
postedCompany.name: AGRICULTURAL BANK OF CHINA LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
